Fix pandas aggregation error in compute_stage_summary

- Convert numeric columns to float/int in _parse_telemetry to ensure
  telemetry data is properly typed instead of remaining as strings
- Handle comma decimal separators (common in European CSVs)
- Add validation in compute_stage_summary to filter metrics to only
  numeric columns before aggregation
- Add informative error message if no numeric columns are found

This fixes the 'TypeError: Could not convert string to numeric' error
that occurred when compute_stage_summary tried to aggregate string
columns instead of numeric ones.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add run_entire_pipeline.sh orchestration script

Creates a comprehensive shell script that orchestrates the entire analysis pipeline:
- Validates prerequisites (venv, data root)
- Activates the virtual environment
- Converts XLS files to CSV (if xls_to_csv.py available)
- Runs main CPET pipeline with support for:
  - ECG feature extraction (--include-ecg)
  - Parallel processing (--parallel --workers N)
  - ML section skipping (--skip-ml)
  - Custom data/output directories
- Optionally runs ECG analysis (--run-batch-ecg)
- Logs all operations to timestamped file in output directory
- Supports dry-run mode for preview
- Includes --help documentation

Usage: ./run_entire_pipeline.sh [--data-root DIR] [--output-root DIR] [--include-ecg] [--run-batch-ecg] [--skip-ml] [--parallel] [--workers N] [--dry-run]

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
test: comprehensive data validation and JSON schema tests (#1558) (#1594)

Add 204 tests across 6 test files in Dungnz.Tests/Data/ validating all
JSON data files for parse integrity, required fields, numeric ranges,
enum validity, duplicate detection, and cross-file referential integrity.

Test files:
- EnemyStatsDataTests.cs (21 tests) — enemy-stats.json validation
- ItemStatsDataTests.cs (29 tests) — item-stats.json validation
- ItemAffixesDataTests.cs (24 tests) — item-affixes.json validation
- StatusEffectsDataTests.cs (25 tests) — status-effects.json validation
- CraftingRecipesDataTests.cs (22 tests) — crafting-recipes.json validation
- MerchantInventoryDataTests.cs (20 tests) — merchant-inventory.json validation
- DataReferentialIntegrityTests.cs (22 tests) — cross-file integrity

Coverage includes:
- All 7 JSON data files parse without error
- Required field presence (Name, Id, Type, etc.)
- Numeric range validation (HP > 0, probabilities 0-1, gold ranges)
- Enum alignment (ItemType, ItemTier, ArmorSlot, StatusEffect)
- Duplicate ID/name detection across all data files
- Cross-file SetId referential integrity (items → set-bonuses)
- Merchant item references → item-stats.json
- Affix OnHitStatus → StatusEffect enum
- StatusEffect JSON ↔ C# enum completeness
- Boss HP thresholds, undead flag consistency
- Kebab-case ID format enforcement
- Known data issue documented: arcanist 4-piece set bonus requires 4
  items but only 3 exist in item-stats.json

Test count: 2598 → 2802 (+204)

commit.message:
Add Lipschitz-based LR capping to GDTrainer to prevent adaptive LR explosion and flat predictions (#36)

* Initial plan

* Add gradient clipping to GDTrainer to prevent flat predictions

The adaptive learning rate formula can produce excessively large updates
when per-sample gradient norms shrink due to activation saturation.
This creates a positive-feedback loop: large updates → tanh saturation
→ tiny gradient norms → inflated adaptive LR → even larger updates →
flat (constant) predictions.

Add max_grad_norm parameter (default=1.0) that clips the global gradient
norm after loss.backward() but before the adaptive-LR update. This
prevents the saturation feedback loop while preserving the mathematical
properties of the adaptive LR formula (the per-sample gradient
denominators remain unclipped).

Before fix: loss diverged (20.3→40.6), predictions flat (std=0.000008)
After fix:  loss decreases (20.3→8.7), predictions non-flat (std=2.69)

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/kyleosung/StepByStep-AdaptiveGDForLipschitzNNs_DEV/sessions/74a1bed7-eb52-49ae-af27-5328b02a8279

Co-authored-by: kyleosung <97492761+kyleosung@users.noreply.github.com>

* Replace gradient clipping with per-parameter LR capping (max_param_lr)

Gradient clipping alters gradient directions, which could change the
paper's convergence results. Per-parameter LR capping is less invasive:
it bounds each adaptive LR (alpha_t^p) at max_param_lr=0.2 while
preserving the exact gradient direction from loss.backward().

This is equivalent to a trust-region step-size constraint: the adaptive
LR formula computes as defined in the paper, but its output is capped
to prevent the saturation feedback loop.

- Replace max_grad_norm with max_param_lr (default 0.2)
- Remove nn.utils.clip_grad_norm_ call from training loop
- Add lr_w = min(lr_w, max_param_lr) after each LR computation
- Add test_lr_capping_preserves_gradient_direction
- Update exact-formula tests to use max_param_lr=None

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/kyleosung/StepByStep-AdaptiveGDForLipschitzNNs_DEV/sessions/6de8ca6d-1598-4866-98a5-15d3f33b0bfe

Co-authored-by: kyleosung <97492761+kyleosung@users.noreply.github.com>

* Replace fixed LR cap with Lipschitz-based cap using Gauss-Newton smoothness

Use the reciprocal of the Gauss-Newton smoothness constant as the
per-parameter LR cap: 1/L_GN where L_GN = (2/N) * sigma_max(J)^2.

The Jacobian J (rows = per-sample gradients nabla_theta f(x_n)) is
already computed for the adaptive LR denominators. Its largest
singular value is estimated via 10 iterations of power iteration on
J^T J, without materialising J.

This is the theoretically-motivated bound from Theorem 3.10: GD
converges when alpha <= 1/L. The cap adapts each step as the network
evolves, replacing the fixed 0.2 heuristic.

max_param_lr now accepts:
  - "lipschitz" (default): dynamic 1/L_GN cap
  - float: fixed cap (previous behavior)
  - None: no cap

Agent-Logs-Url: https://github.com/kyleosung/StepByStep-AdaptiveGDForLipschitzNNs_DEV/sessions/5ae7436c-07a8-40e9-a483-b236ef965625

Co-authored-by: kyleosung <97492761+kyleosung@users.noreply.github.com>

Phase 6-10: MIDI engine, DSP plugins, stereo processing, project file, profiling

Phase 6 — daw-midi crate:
- MidiMessage, MidiEvent, MidiTrack with sort/duration helpers
- midi_pitch_to_hz, ticks_to_samples utilities
- MidiSequencer: sample-accurate tick→sample scheduling, emits AudioCommands
- PolySynth: polyphonic synth with ADSR, voice stealing, 4 waveforms (Sine/Sawtooth/Square/Triangle)
- PolySynth implements AudioNode for graph integration
- 7 integration tests

Phase 7 — Built-in DSP Plugins (daw-engine/src/plugins.rs):
- BiquadFilter: 7 types, Audio EQ Cookbook coefficients, Direct Form II Transposed
- Compressor: feed-forward RMS with attack/release/threshold/ratio/makeup gain
- SimpleReverb: Schroeder reverb (4 comb + 2 allpass filters)
- DelayLine: feedback delay with configurable time/feedback/wet
- 5 integration tests

Phase 8 — Stereo Processing:
- apply_gain_stereo, apply_pan_stereo (constant-power panning)
- mono_to_stereo, stereo_to_mono, compute_stereo_peak, compute_stereo_rms
- StereoGainNode AudioNode for per-channel gain

Phase 9 — Project File Format (daw-engine/src/project_file.rs):
- ProjectFile, TrackConfig, AutomationData with serde JSON serialization
- validate() enforces sample_rate/buffer_size/tempo/volume/pan ranges
- Roundtrip integration test

Phase 10 — Profiling (daw-engine/src/profiling.rs):
- Optional tracy feature with tracing-tracy subscriber
- init_profiling() and profile_span() helpers
- process_block() wrapped in TRACE span

All 27 tests pass, zero clippy warnings.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

CloudSharing: eliminar doble animación usando presenter transparente

Causa: había dos capas de presentación (SwiftUI sheet + UICloudSharingController
encima), dando lugar a dos animaciones al abrir y dos al cerrar.

Solución: CloudSharingView pasa a ser un UIViewControllerRepresentable de
tamaño cero (background modifier) que presenta UICloudSharingController
directamente sobre el top-most UIViewController de la app.
No hay SwiftUI sheet → una sola capa de presentación, una sola animación.

PlanDetailView usa .background { CloudSharingView(...) } en vez de .sheet.

commit.message:
CloudSharing: cerrar sheet en blanco al cerrar el sharing controller

Al cerrar UICloudSharingController con 'Listo'/'Done' sin cambios,
ningún método del delegate es llamado, por lo que el ContainerVC
quedaba visible como sheet en blanco.

Fix: ContainerVC.viewWillAppear detecta cuando reaparece después de
que el sharing controller fue presentado (sharingPresented == true)
y cierra automáticamente el sheet exterior.

CloudSharing: corregir API y bug de caché de planRecords

CloudKitStore:
- crearNuevoShare(): crea y guarda el CKShare; actualiza planRecords
  con el record devuelto por el servidor (con la referencia al share)
- fetchShareExistente(): obtiene el CKShare existente para el plan
- tieneShareLocal(): check síncrono de si el plan ya tiene share en caché
- prepararShare(): refactorizado usando crearNuevoShare()
- Bug corregido: planRecords se actualizaba con el record pre-guardado
  (sin referencia al share), causando shares duplicados en llamadas
  sucesivas

CloudSharingView:
- Si el plan ya tiene share → UICloudSharingController(share:container:)
  para gestionar participantes/permisos
- Si es nuevo → preparationHandler que llama a crearNuevoShare() interno
  (share se crea Y guarda dentro del handler, como exige la API)
- Ambas rutas usan los 4 permisos disponibles

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Add Missing WCF Event Templates (#2390)

* Fix ApplicationServerTraceEventParser to match WCF ETW manifest

- Rename ServiceAction to SoapAction in Multidata22TemplateHATraceData to fix
  bug where PayloadValue(0) and ToXml() resolved to the Action<T> delegate
  instead of the string property
- Replace 0xFFFF sentinel event IDs with correct IDs for 7 events:
  39456-39460 (workflow tracking), 57398 (MaxInstancesExceeded),
  62326 (HttpHandlerPickedForUrl)
- Add 17 missing infrastructure events (IDs 57393-57410, except 57398)
  with event properties and template registrations
- Expand EnumerateTemplates array from 464 to 481 entries

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Register ApplicationServerTraceEventParser in TraceLog standard parsers

Add ApplicationServerTraceEventParser to RegisterStandardParsers() so
WCF events are automatically parsed when processing ETL/ETLX files.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Fix ApplicationServerTraceEventParser round-trip test for all 481 events

Fixed 4 issues in the synthetic nettrace trace test:

1. Chunk05 metadataId propagation: WriteEvents_Chunk05 used a local 'id'
   variable but never propagated it back to the ref parameter, causing all
   subsequent chunks (06+) to reference wrong metadata IDs.

2. Chunk05 threadIndex: Changed from 0 to 999 for consistency with all
   other chunks.

3. Chunk09 metadataId calculation: Fixed baseMetadataId = __metadataId - 37
   to baseMetadataId = __metadataId (the -37 offset was incorrect) and
   added proper metadataId advancement (+37) after writing events.

4. Chunk01 template fields: Removed spurious EventTime (FileTime) fields
   from all 12 TemplateHA field arrays. The parser skips EventTime and
   reads subsequent fields at offsets that assume it is not present.
   Updated two validation indices (IsFaultSource 12->11, SubInstanceID
   4->3) to match the corrected field positions.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* review-loop iteration 1: fix broken UnregisterEventTemplate and add ServiceAction back-compat alias

- Fix 17 new events (57393-57410) to unregister with correct event ID
  and ProviderGuid instead of (0, Guid.Empty)
- Add [Obsolete] ServiceAction property alias on Multidata22TemplateHATraceData
  to preserve API compatibility after the SoapAction rename

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

* Refactor round-trip test to use event names instead of event numbers

- Change firedEvents dictionary key from int (event ID) to string (event name)
- Use event name-based variable names in Validate methods
- Remove event ID numbers from comments and assert messages

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
CloudSharing: corregir error 'No optionsGroups provided'

La causa: UICloudSharingController con preparationHandler espera que
el CKShare NO esté guardado en CloudKit cuando se llama el completion.
Al usar prepararShare() (que ya guarda el share), CloudKit detecta el
conflicto y falla con CKError code=1.

Solución: guardar el share primero con prepararShare() y luego usar
UICloudSharingController(share:container:) — el inicializador para
shares ya existentes en CloudKit. Además se añade .allowPublic para
que CloudKit pueda construir el grupo 'access type' de la UI.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

CloudSharing: corregir página en blanco en UICloudSharingController

El problema: SwiftUI envuelve el UIViewControllerRepresentable en un
UIHostingController antes de que la ventana esté lista, por lo que
UICloudSharingController se presenta sin jerarquía de ventana válida
y muestra una página en blanco.

Solución: usar un ContainerVC (subclase de UIViewController) que
presenta UICloudSharingController en viewDidAppear, cuando la ventana
ya está disponible. prepararShare() maneja tanto shares nuevos como
existentes, por lo que siempre se usa el preparationHandler.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Mapa: 'Mostrar en el mapa' cuando hay coordenadas guardadas

- DireccionSection: el botón cambia a 'Show on map' (mappin.and.ellipse)
  cuando ya hay coordenadas; 'Search on map' cuando no las hay
- Eliminados 'Coordinates saved' y la fila de coordenadas (redundantes)
- MapPickerView.init: si hay coordenadas, inicializa position centrada
  en ellas en vez de .automatic
- MapPickerView.task: si hay coordenadas, restaura el marcador rojo
  con nombre+ciudad antes de que el usuario interactúe; si no, centra
  en la ubicación del usuario como antes

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Direccion: campo dirección completa + coordenadas opcionales

Modelo:
- Nuevo campo 'direccionCompleta' en Direccion (calle, número, CP)
- estaVacia ahora comprueba descripcion + direccionCompleta + ciudad

MapPickerView:
- aplicar() rellena direccionCompleta con formato 'Calle Nº, CP Ciudad'
  construido desde subThoroughfare + thoroughfare + postalCode + locality

DireccionSection (formulario):
- Vista previa mejorada: nombre en negrita, dirección completa y ciudad/país
- Indicador 'Coordinates saved' con icono de ubicación si hay coordenadas
- Nuevo campo 'Full address' editable manualmente
- Fila de coordenadas (lat/lon) con botón × para borrarlas

EtapaMapView:
- Panel inferior usa direccionCompleta como detalle si está disponible,
  fallback a ciudad + país como antes

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

[build] Cache Gradle downloads between CI runs (#10986)

Add a shared `cache-gradle.yaml` template using the Cache@2 task to
persist `~/.gradle/caches` between pipeline runs. This prevents transient
DNS/network failures from breaking builds when resolving Maven Central
dependencies (e.g. javaparser for java-source-utils).

The cache key includes `Agent.OS`, `gradle-wrapper.properties`, and all
`build.gradle` files, so it auto-invalidates on Gradle version or
dependency changes.

Used by all three build step templates (macOS, Linux, Windows) which
covers Xamarin.Android, Xamarin.Android-PR, and dnceng-public pipelines.

Context: https://learn.microsoft.com/azure/devops/pipelines/release/caching

## [build] Remove Java.Interop paths from Gradle cache key

The external/Java.Interop submodule is not checked out when the cache
step runs (submodules are initialized later during make jenkins). Use
only the main repo gradle-wrapper.properties and build.gradle files.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <175728472+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Fix: mover sheet del mapa al nivel de EtapaFormView

Múltiples DireccionSection en el mismo form (origen + destino en
vuelos/transporte) causaban 'already presenting' porque cada una
tenía su propio .sheet simultáneamente activo.

Solución: un único .sheet(item: $slotMapa) en EtapaFormView.
DireccionSection ahora usa un callback onBuscarEnMapa en lugar de
gestionar su propio estado de presentación.

Fix python command for Linux Helix work items (#5179)

The Ubuntu 22.04 Helix image was updated and no longer provides a
'python' command (only 'python3'). This broke all Linux Helix work
items in public CI with 'python: not found' (exit code 127).

- Change the non-Windows work item command from 'python' to 'python3'
- Use the existing 'agent_python' variable ('python3' on Linux,
  'py -3' on Windows) for the Python env var passed to .proj files,
  instead of unconditionally using 'python'

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
chore: upgrade angular-libs to Angular 20

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: Add message recovery endpoints for dead-lettered messages (#31, #32)

## Issue #31: Sender-initiated Reprocess
- New endpoint: POST /api/integrations/messages/:id/reprocess
- Sender can trigger full re-mapping + re-delivery pipeline for dead-lettered messages
- Authorization: Source partner or admin only
- Resets status to 'failed', retries to 0, error_message to null
- Returns 202 with status 'processing'

## Issue #32: Receiver-initiated Re-delivery
- New endpoint: POST /api/integrations/messages/:id/redeliver
- Receiver can trigger webhook re-delivery without re-mapping
- Uses existing mapped_payload from original processing attempt
- Authorization: Target partner or admin only
- Returns 409 if no mapped_payload exists (suggests reprocess instead)
- Returns 202 with status 'processing'

## Backend Changes
- apps/integration-service/src/routes/integrations.ts: Added both POST endpoints with full auth/validation
- apps/integration-service/src/services/messageRouter.ts:
  - Added retryReprocess() method for #31 (full pipeline re-trigger)
  - Added retryDelivery() method for #32 (webhook-only retry)
  - Automatic retry count tracking with dead-letter promotion
  - WebSocket status_update frame push on completion (if enabled)

## Frontend Changes
- apps/partner-portal/src/lib/api.ts: Added integrationsApi.reprocess() and integrationsApi.redeliver()
- apps/partner-portal/src/app/integrations/page.tsx:
  - DetailPanel now shows 'Reprocess' button for senders of dead_lettered messages
  - DetailPanel now shows 'Re-deliver' button for receivers of dead_lettered messages
  - Clear descriptions explain when to use each action
  - Success/error feedback displayed inline
  - Optimistic UI updates on action

## Implementation Details
- Both actions check authorization before proceeding (partner role verification)
- Proper HTTP status codes: 202 Accepted, 404 Not Found, 403 Forbidden, 409 Conflict
- Async processing: actions return immediately; status updates pushed via WebSocket
- Database: Uses existing messages table columns (no migration needed)
- Error handling: Errors logged server-side; UI shows user-friendly messages

## Acceptance Criteria Met ✅
- [x] POST /api/integrations/messages/:id/reprocess resets status and re-triggers full pipeline
- [x] Partners can only reprocess messages they sent; admins can reprocess any
- [x] Returns 409 if message is not in dead_lettered state
- [x] POST /api/integrations/messages/:id/redeliver retries webhook only
- [x] Returns 409 if message not dead_lettered or has no mapped_payload
- [x] Only target partner (or admin) can trigger re-delivery
- [x] Reprocess button visible on dead_lettered rows for message sender
- [x] Re-deliver button visible on dead_lettered rows for message receiver
- [x] Buttons hidden appropriately (senders don't see re-deliver, receivers don't see reprocess)
- [x] Success/error feedback shown in UI
- [x] WebSocket status_update frames pushed on completion (if ws_status_push enabled)

Closes #31 #32

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
